steps.label: Rounded blue macOS tile
steps.intent: Establish the 1024px icon silhouette and blue brand field.

steps.label: Subtle glossy rim
steps.intent: Adds the top-left app-icon polish without changing the silhouette.

steps.label: Cool body shadow
steps.intent: Draws the pale blue edge that separates the white goose from the blue field.

steps.label: White goose body
steps.intent: Primary goose silhouette: head, neck, chest, tail flick, and lower-right body.

steps.label: Orange beak
steps.intent: Left-facing beak mass, aligned to the PNG reference.

steps.label: Lower beak shade
steps.intent: Orange underside line tucked inside the beak, not a separate brown shape.

steps.label: Eye and catchlight
steps.intent: Black eye with small white highlight for character.

steps.label: Loading orbit
steps.intent: Blue orbit arcs that can rotate around the goose for loading/splash states.
